updateNote: Day 58 noon refresh — Lebanese Health Ministry raises death toll to 2,491 (7,719 injured). USS Pinckney intercepts OFAC-sanctioned LPG tanker M/V SEVAN in central Arabian Sea (200,600 bbl LPG) — blockade going global. Hormuz transits recovered to 19 (April 25). Pezeshkian: 'Iran will not enter imposed negotiations under pressure, threats, or blockade.' Trump on Truth Social: 'We have all the cards.' Araghchi post-Oman: visit 'fruitful,' US seriousness questioned. WHCD shooter Cole Allen (Torrance CA) charged after firing at Washington Hilton checkpoint April 25. JP Morgan: Brent could overshoot $150 if Hormuz closed into mid-May. EASA extends Israeli airspace warning to May 1. War Powers May 1 — 5 days.
dataFreshnessWarning: Data current as of 12:10 PM PDT April 26, 2026 (Day 58). Next update expected within 12-24 hours.
